headline: Is Consolidated Edison (ED) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Stability?
summary: If you are wondering whether Consolidated Edison is fairly priced at around US$111.68, the key question is how that share price lines up with its underlying value. The stock has delivered returns of 2.0% over the last 7 days, 0.6% over the last 30 days, 11.7% year to date and 6.1% over the past year, which gives you some context before looking at what the valuation signals are saying. Recent attention on Consolidated Edison has focused on its role as a core regulated utility and its exposure...
